Functional requirements: A statement of a piece of required functionality or a behavior that a system will exhibit under specific conditions.
Nonfunctional requirements: A description of a property or characteristic that the system should exhibit.
Pre condition: A condition that must be satisfied or a state the system must be in before a use case may begin.
Requirement: A statement of a customer need or objective or of a condition or capability that a product must possess to satisfy such a need or objective.
Actors: Customer Weborder System Preconditions: Customer must be able to access the web order system via a web browser with HTTPS.

partial_only_examples.source_requirement: Each voucher should have two portions with three tear off voucher slips each for Client and Partner.
partial_only_examples.generated_requirement: This validity date can be amended or altered at the system level ONLY by the authorized user Voucher will also have MRP (maximum retail price) Voucher should have three tear off portioned slips with a sub-section tear-off for the partner.
partial_only_examples.reason: The generated requirement introduces new concepts like validity date and MRP. While it mentions tear-off slips for the partner, it alters the specific structure described in the source ('two portions with three tear off voucher slips each for Client and Partner' vs 'three tear off portioned slips with a sub-section tear-off for the partner').

partial_only_examples.source_requirement: This validity date can be amended or altered at the system level ONLY by the authorized user Voucher will also have MRP (maximum retail price) Voucher should have three tear off portioned slips with a sub-section tear-off for the partner.
partial_only_examples.generated_requirement: Each voucher should have two portions with three tear off voucher slips each for Client and Partner.
partial_only_examples.reason: The generated requirement alters the number of portions and slips (from 'three tear off portioned slips with a sub-section tear-off for the partner' to 'two portions with three tear off voucher slips each for Client and Partner'), and completely misses the validity date and MRP details from the source.

partial_only_examples.source_requirement: During every distribution transaction the user should select the name of the sales man listed from Team Master.
partial_only_examples.generated_requirement: Name of the distributor* Name of the Sales Man* Date of distribution* No of vouchers sold*.

partial_only_examples.source_requirement: Claim (Treatment Form) Submission Depends on the payment terms (Bi-monthly / Monthly) mentioned in the VSP master the VSP should submit the Claim (Treatment form) to the MISU Field office.

partial_only_examples.reason: The generated requirement addresses the storage of payment terms, which is related to the source's condition, but it loses the core need of claim submission and its dependency, and adds details about a screen and agreement.
